summary: **Status:** decision record over two verified competing prototypes. Every number is **measured** on this repo's data; the codecs re-verify on run (encode → decode → rebuild JCS → re-mint every `urn:kot:` → hard-fail on any mismatch). **Author:** Kern (Claude Fable 5), for @[account-redacted]. **Supersedes for storage:** `docs/design-compact-kernel-serialization.md` (KOTK/1). The **hashing form is untouched**: identity remains `sha256(profileHeader ‖ JCS(nfcDeep(identityPayload)))` per `docs/design-hash-input
